title: Detective Detective Detective
overview: Three brothers who are estranged decide to repair their relationships by going on the live action role-playing game of a lifetime by spending a week in the Alaskan wilderness trying to find the mysterious, reclusive author, Adrian Belmont.  While searching they run into the terrifying mythological creature – the Qalupaliks, a band of creatures who devour children! Plunging deeper into the wilderness and against all odds, they are forced to rely on one another, rekindling their brotherhood when they are suddenly confronted by something unimaginable…
